examples: I hope you will become a great scientist like Elbert Einstein in the future.
We work to become, not to acquire. — Elbert Hubbard.
Do not take life too seriously. You will never get out it alive. - Elbert Hubbard.
Elbert Hubbard was a Gilded Age original, his eccentricities exaggerated by a Dutchboy haircut and ubiquitous floppy tie.
The Roycrofters continued for another 23 years under Hubbard's son, Elbert II.
